name: Crescent Cheese Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. Open one package of crescent rolls and line a 13" x 9-inch pan.
2. Pinch together triangles and form the crust.
3. Mix all other ingredients and pour over the crust.
4. Top with the remaining package of crescent rolls and pinch together triangles to form the top crust.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Frost after cooled with glaze (1 cup powdered sugar, ½ tsp vanilla and 2 Tbsp milk). Best when served cold.
